ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-09-2016 Off Calendar

Notice Of Default Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Aug-02-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: A. Mok, CSR: Mitch Lyon, CSR#6840.

Alisa J. Kim, Esq., specially appearing for Plaintiff, American Express Bank, FSB, a Federal Savings Bank,
Order Granting Waiver of Witness Requirement of Hearing on Application for Default Prove-up, on file.
No appearance by defaulted defendant Johnny T. Yu AKA Johnny T. Yu Sr., AKA Johnny Young, AKA Johnny Tan Young AKA Joihnny Y Lim an individual,
Default of Defendant has been duly entered.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant as follows:
Damages: $10,016.41
Pre-Judgment Interest: $0
Attorney's Fees: $0
Costs: $435.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $10,451.41

Judgment signed in open court.

Notice Of Default Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Jul-12-2016 Continued To Aug-02-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
